_provenance.stage: Stage 6 — Synthesis (retroactive rebuild from Codex Stage 3)

revision_log: CORRECTED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — RM8B savings figure was outdated; updated to ~RM15.5B annually per Anwar Budget 2026.
CORRECTED (Stage 3): INCORRECT — 'Rafizi resigned over disagreements about how PADU would be used' replaced with verified resignation reason (lost PKR deputy-presidency race, no party mandate).
REPHRASED (Stage 3): PADU framing softened from 'official targeting backbone' to 'one of the key reference databases for MoF targeted-subsidy validation' (official wording).
CORRECTED (Stage 3): Electricity-rationalisation figures updated to ~RM6B/year average per Budget 2026 (was the older 'RM4B').

REPHRASED (Stage 3): UNVERIFIED absence claims softened: 'No independent body publishes audited results' → 'Independent per-cohort audits remain limited' and 'No separate independent auditor publishes per-cohort delivery results in available reporting'.
REPHRASED (Stage 3): View card 'Subsidy rationalisation needs an independent audit body' framed as 'reform proposal'.
PRESERVED (Stage 3 VERIFIED): June 2024 diesel rationalisation; H2 2025 RON95 targeting; PADU ~30.4M profiles; data-quality concerns flagged; ministerial self-reporting.
